src/lib/db/schema/recommendations.ts.description: Recommendations schema now includes completion tracking fields: startedAt (timestamp), baselineScore/postImplementationScore/scoreImprovement/effectivenessScore (integers for GEO score tracking), userRating/userFeedback/feedbackAt (user feedback fields). All new fields nullable.

src/app/api/recommendations/[id]/status/.description: Status endpoint now supports score capture. When transitioning to in_progress, requires baselineScore and sets startedAt. When completing, requires postImplementationScore and calculates scoreImprovement and effectivenessScore using lib/analytics/effectiveness utilities. Priority mapping: critical/high -> high, medium -> medium, low -> low.

src/app/api/recommendations/feedback/rou.description: Feedback API now persists directly to recommendations table. Uses userRating (int 1-5), userFeedback (text), feedbackAt (timestamp) fields. Org authorization done via brand lookup. Simplified from previous in-memory feedbackManager to database persistence.
